title: User Manual: PARIVESH Forest Clearance Mobile Application
introduction: The PARIVESH Forest Clearance Mobile Application is a mobile extension of the existing PARIVESH web portal, aiming to enhance accessibility, transparency, and efficiency in the forest clearance workflow.
purpose: To define the functional and non-functional requirements for the development of the PARIVESH Forest Clearance Mobile Application.
steps: Click View AgendaSend NotificationView MoM button
